title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on critical platform stability improvements that restore full functionality across all OpsPal integrations. Teams can now reliably deploy Salesforce workflows without interruption, and HubSpot automations are working properly again. The platform update system also received enhancements to ensure smoother future releases.

entries.headline: Release notes now display complete history for weeks 12 and 13
Platform updates now include latest marketplace features automatically
Salesforce deployments now detect regional settings and retry failed operations
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when your Salesforce org uses state and country picklists
Failed deployment steps now retry automatically to handle temporary connection issues
Deployment validation checks permissions before making changes to prevent errors

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployments now run more reliably
HubSpot automations work properly again after critical fix
